articles.title: Social Service - The Child-Study Course
articles.notes: The provided PDF images show pages from October 1928 (Vol. XV, No. 10) but the article is listed in the November 1928 table of contents. The images contain advertisements, table of contents, frontispiece photo of Augusta Winters Grant, poem 'Autumn' by Brooks Kairn, and a photo of missionaries in Japan. The Social Service article would be on page 621 according to the contents, but that page is not included in these images.
